title: CAPTCHA Solver Input
description: Solve CAPTCHAs using AI vision models. Supports hCaptcha, reCAPTCHA v2/v3, Turnstile, and FunCaptcha.

taskText.title: Challenge Text
taskText.description: The CAPTCHA instruction text (e.g. 'Click each image containing a bus')
taskText.example: Please click each image containing a motorbus

images.title: CAPTCHA Images
images.description: List of image URLs or base64 data URIs. For grids, provide all cell images. For canvas, provide one image.

isCanvas.title: Canvas Challenge
isCanvas.description: Set to true for canvas/interactive challenges (single image, returns click coordinates)

sitekey.title: Site Key
sitekey.description: Site key for token-based solving (reCAPTCHA v3, Turnstile). Not needed for image challenges.
sitekey.groupDescription: For reCAPTCHA v3 and Turnstile (invisible CAPTCHAs)

pageUrl.title: Page URL
pageUrl.description: Page URL where the CAPTCHA appears. Required for token-based solving.

geminiApiKey.title: Gemini API Key
geminiApiKey.description: Google Gemini API key for free VLM solving (250/day). Get one at aistudio.google.com
geminiApiKey.groupDescription: At least one VLM key recommended. Gemini is free.
